calendar.matters:
Petition For Order (1) Transferring Real Property To Trust And (2) Confirming That Inherited Property Has Been Properly Transferred To Trust
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christina Gallagher Nelson for and with Rita Schuman.

The Court stated that it was satisfied, that notice was properly given, and granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.
